title: ViT-CoMer: Vision Transformer with Convolutional Multi-scale Feature Interaction for Dense Predictions
title_en: ViT-CoMer: Vision Transformer with Convolutional Multi-scale Feature Interaction for Dense Predictions
authors: Chunlong Xia, Xinliang Wang, Feng Lv, Xin Hao, Yifeng Shi
authors_en: Chunlong Xia, Xinliang Wang, Feng Lv, Xin Hao, Yifeng Shi
desc: 提出即插即用 CNN-ViT 跨模态特征交互模块,通过跨阶段特征对齐与门控融合策略实现全局与局部特征融合。在密集预测任务上实现了SOTA效果,例如COCO AP 64.3% SOTA,ADE20K mIoU 62.1%
desc_en: Proposed a plug-and-play CNN-ViT feature interaction module leveraging cross-stage alignment and gated fusion for global-local integration. Achieves SOTA on dense prediction: 64.3% AP (MS COCO) and 62.1% mIoU (ADE20K).

title: Open-TransMind: A New Baseline and Benchmark for 1st Foundation Model Challenge of Intelligent Transportation
title_en: Open-TransMind: A New Baseline and Benchmark for 1st Foundation Model Challenge of Intelligent Transportation
authors: Yifeng Shi,Feng Lv, Xinliang Wang, Chunlong Xia, Shaojie Li, Shujie Yang, Teng Xi, Gang Zhang
authors_en: Yifeng Shi, Feng Lv, Xinliang Wang, Chunlong Xia, Shaojie Li, Shujie Yang, Teng Xi, Gang Zhang
desc: 百度智能交通感知大模型 Open-TransMind,参数规模超 100 亿,全面覆盖检测/分割/分类/OCR 等 70 余项任务,平均相对错误率较小模型降低 50.6%,树立行业新标杆。
desc_en: Baidu's Open-TransMind traffic perception foundation model (10B+ parameters), covering detection/segmentation/classification/OCR across 70+ tasks, reducing average relative error by 50.6% over task-specific models, setting a new industry benchmark.

title: RT-DETRv3: Real-time End-to-End Object Detection with Hierarchical Dense Positive Supervision
title_en: RT-DETRv3: Real-time End-to-End Object Detection with Hierarchical Dense Positive Supervision
authors: Shuo Wang, Chunlong Xia, Feng lv,Yifeng Shi
authors_en: Shuo Wang, Chunlong Xia, Feng Lv, Yifeng Shi
desc: 通过 one-to-many 匹配方式提升模型效果并加快收敛速度,在实时目标检测领域取得 SOTA 性能。
desc_en: Achieved SOTA real-time object detection performance via one-to-many assignment to improve accuracy and accelerate convergence. 120+ citations.

title: RT-DATR: Real-time Domain Adaption Detection Transformer with Adversarial Feature Learning
title_en: RT-DATR: Real-time Domain Adaption Detection Transformer with Adversarial Feature Learning
authors: Feng Lv, Guoqing Li, Jin Li, Chunlong Xia
authors_en: Feng Lv, Guoqing Li, Jin Li, Chunlong Xia
desc: 提出无监督域自适应算法 RT-DATR,通过对齐目标级与全局语义特征分布,提取域不变特征,增强模型跨城市泛化能力。
desc_en: Proposed RT-DATR, an unsupervised domain adaptation algorithm that extracts domain-invariant features by aligning object-level and global semantic feature distributions for cross-city generalization.

title: Text2Traffic: A Text-to-Image Generation and Edit Method for Traffic Scenes
title_en: Text2Traffic: A Text-to-Image Generation and Edit Method for Traffic Scenes
authors: Feng Lv,Haoxuan Feng, Zilu Zhang, Chunlong Xia, Yanfeng Li
authors_en: Feng Lv, Haoxuan Feng, Zilu Zhang, Chunlong Xia, Yanfeng Li
desc: 面向交通场景的文生图与图像编辑系统,基于 T2I+DiT 架构,通过可控掩码机制,将图像生成（全图掩码）和编辑（局部掩码）统一为图像修复任务。累计生成 2 万+高价值数据,平均可用率 74.6%。
desc_en: Traffic-Specific T2I & Editing System: Built on a T2I+DiT architecture, unifies generation (full mask) and editing (local mask) into a single inpainting task via controllable masking. Cumulatively generated 20k+ high-value samples with a 74.6% average usability rate.

title: CRASH-Bench: An Automated Multimodal Benchmark for Traffic Accident Causal Reasoning
title_en: CRASH-Bench: An Automated Multimodal Benchmark for Traffic Accident Causal Reasoning
desc: 构建面向交通事故因果推理的多模态自动化评测基准,聚焦视频理解与结构化信息输出,推动多模态大模型在交通安全领域的落地评测。
desc_en: An automated multimodal benchmark for traffic accident causal reasoning, targeting video understanding and structured information output, advancing evaluation of multimodal LLMs in traffic safety.
